description: CompositionRound neck sleeveless t-shirt made of 50% cotton and 50% modal, with a string tie-back and graphic print with glitter on the left lengthFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Sway to the splashing colours of life in this fabulous t-shirt from lee. The soft fabric made of a cotton and modal mix makes this tee avsolutely maintenance free, durable and adds to it a subtle sheen, while the colourful splash of colours and glitter on the print running along the left length creates a happy, feminine environment coupled with the tie-back string. Team this with straight cut jeans or shorts and chic sandals for that stylish edge.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
